safe_fixes.authority_basis: docs/architecture/VALIDATION_RULES.md defines INV-CANON-NO-HIST-REF scope as canonical docs; 10H evidence classified the triggering docs/refactor packets as DERIVED.
safe_fixes.change: check_doc_references now treats docs/archive references as INV-CANON-NO-HIST-REF only when the referencing document is canonical by status header or CANON_INDEX membership.
